Title: 改过劝善 后举二子——《命相真谛》
Transcript: 🎼假人50岁，还没有子嗣，晚上梦见到了一所府宅，匾额上提生育词三字，因而上前叩求子嗣，主人曲步册查阅，说，你曾监污一良人的妻子，想求子嗣是不可能的。假人哀求说，小明无知，祈求赎罪。神说，你记已悔过，再劝时人不邪淫，方可赎罪，再劝话多人就能有子了。假人醒后，痛字改悔，从此广劝世人，感化了很多人。后来生了两个儿子。
Label: Normal

att_response.negative_outcome: A middle-aged man (假人/“假人50岁”) lacks children (子嗣问题), which is framed as a moral/spiritual failing that prevents fulfillment of his desire for offspring.
att_response.causal_attribution: The video attributes the inability to have children to the man’s prior wrongdoing: he “曾监污一良人的妻子” (previously violated/defiled a good man’s wife). Causality is established through a direct narrative claim by a divine figure (神说), reinforced by the owner’s consultation/record-check (主人曲步册查阅) that confirms the wrongdoing as the reason the request is impossible.
att_response.controllability: The cause is portrayed as intentional and within the man’s control: the wrongdoing is framed as deliberate sexual misconduct (“邪淫/监污”), not as an accident or uncontrollable circumstance. The man’s later repentance (“痛字改悔”) and subsequent moral reform (“再劝时人不邪淫”) are presented as controllable actions that can change the outcome.
att_response.responsibility_blame: High moral responsibility and condemnation are assigned to the man for sexual misconduct against another person’s spouse. The narrative explicitly links his past act to the negative outcome and requires repentance and continued moral correction of others to be eligible for redemption.
att_response.punitive_tendency: The video implies a punitive/hostile response in the form of denial of the requested benefit (childbearing is “不可能的” until redemption). It also endorses moral retribution through spiritual judgment (赎罪/赎罪条件) rather than physical punishment, with an exclusionary condition: until he repents and reforms, he is barred from receiving the desired outcome.

Title: 阴道镜检查的最佳时间，你一定要知道
Transcript: 🎼그.阴道镜检查的最佳时间呢，这个视频呢讲清楚。大家好，我是妇科薛医生。昨天晚上观看本丝私信的时候，看见有人问阴道镜检查呢，什么时间是最好。针对这个问题呢，就给大家出一期视频，建议收藏或者转发给需要的人。其实阴道镜检查也好，活检也好，尤其是想决定做活检的时候，我们一般都是建议月经刚干净以后做检查比较合适。因为这个时候呢做阴道镜活检会有创面。这个时候的话取完活检，这个创面呢就不太容易。🎼出血月经前呢，因为充血的原因呢，所以活解完以后，这个创面有可能会出血呀或者出血时间比较长。所以呢在月经刚刚结束以后是最佳的。做阴道镜活检的时间。一般情况下，医生预约阴道镜活检的话，也会给你一个建议的，大家清楚了吗？有问题留言，我来帮你解答。

Title: 女子患“体内掉肉”怪病，子宫阴道等掉出体外，医生手术缓解尴尬
Transcript: 🎼11月2日，广东东莞张女士漏尿、便秘，排便困难，甚至下半身还总掉出一坨肉，掉肉是减肥成功吗？并不是这坨肉是从阴道里掉出，曾经两次手术都没治好，让她多年来有苦难言。她患上的是中老年女性中高发的盆腔器官脱垂，简单说就是子宫、阴道、膀胱等盆腔内器官，反而沿着阴道向外滑脱。经过进一步检查，医生发现，张女士是子宫切除术后出现的重度阴道后壁脱垂半直肠膨触。😡医生决定使用网片厚露修补会因体重建术，给盆底加了一张网片做的吊床，使盆腔脏器得到良好支撑，不再脱垂，缓解不是症状。术后，张女士排便不再费力，那坨肉也不再掉出。

Title: 阴茎外洗法，丁丁变大变持久
Transcript: 🎼 让丁丁变坚挺，能有20分钟，在家就能做满分男人。这个好方法你可不能错过。前段时间，一个复诊的患者说，经过两周的调理，时间延长到20分钟，硬度也像黄瓜一样，每次发射能有一米多远。今天教大家变强的技巧，一般10天左右，你会看到变化。上面那位患者就是用的这个方法，然后再结合补肾填津的汤药，不到一个月时间，时间就延长到了20分钟，邦邦印。根据之前外洗降。一敏感度的方法，同时结合每个患者的体质辩证论治，已经帮助很多患者找回自信。如果你也需要的话，点个小红心加关注，在评论区留个6，我尽全力帮助你。

Transcript: 🎼来弟兄们抓紧开机steam起侠一橡胶乱斗嘉年华刚刚上线，免费开玩多人乱斗竞技游戏，支持整体中文，最多8人联机和橡胶强盗师出中门，由抚养转化为第三人称后肩视角，自定义可爱的橡皮泥强盗在圣诞岛地图中乱斗厮杀，还是熟悉的物理引擎场景内道具武器，随机刷新远程武器范围射击，近战武器，除了挥舞攻击，还能作为暗器瞄准投掷，开展捧出爆笑的淘杀竞技，各类平台阶机元素丰富。把其他玩家基晕或者干脆推下平台。这把游戏没有规则可言，率先到达终点示威胜利，而为了胜利，可以负责手段，免费的，不能不要，可以不玩，不能没有，点个关注，抓紧入库，关注万有游戏堂，每天精彩不重样。

Title: 瞒着家里人做了变性手术是什么体验

Title: 女儿被班上男同学相中，一脸傲娇告诉妈妈，妈妈：是谁拐了我女儿
Transcript: 🎼他说孙一涵，我觉得很漂亮，是我想跟你结婚。真的谁呀？徐成，我明天去问问他，你们现那已经确学了，你怎么问我？😊我明天在门口把看到他，我就把他抓住去问问他，你问问宋银还说是不是真的好吗？好真的嗯真的。

Title: 男生如果应对白莲花
Transcript: 🎼假如我是一朵高段位白莲花，我绝对不会告诉你最高级的套路就是没有套路。我可是要了半颗真心做赌注的。毕竟越高端的人群，那一套圆滑心机懂得都懂，我能让你感受到我这一份真诚，进而对我打开信任，对人心理解透彻的女生，他不会寄希望于一个男人的良心，而是懂得去引诱男人的私心，虽然万物不为我所有，但是万物一定皆为我所用。比方说我先观察你，识别你的自尊。心在哪里，进一步去满足你勾取你自恋的特质，这叫欲取之先与之。我多动嘴，少干事，大事小事都砍自己身上，这样的女人就太傻了。
Label: Offensive

Title: 阴道镜检查全过程，到底有多疼
Transcript: 🎼阴道镜检查是一种常见的妇科检查，用于检查宫颈外阴或阴道区域的任何异常，包括炎症损伤或癌细胞增长。阴道镜检查期间，患者会被要求躺下，检查者将使用窥镜，打开阴道查看宫颈检查人员将拍摄宫颈被生理盐水清洗前的清晰图像涂抹溶液之前用少量生理盐水擦拭宫颈并拍摄图像，还需要使用醋酸。😊溶液浸染后再次拍摄图像，然后用炉哥点液对宫颈进行染色，并拍摄图像检查完成后，由医生对症状做出判断，整个时间大概在5到10分钟。
Label: Normal

att_response.negative_outcome: 视频强调“阴道镜检查到底有多疼”，负面情境是患者在妇科检查过程中可能经历疼痛与不适，并伴随对检查流程（窥镜、消毒/清洗、醋酸、染色等）的痛感描述。
att_response.causal_attribution: 并未将疼痛归咎于特定人群的恶意或过错。因果关系主要通过科普叙述建立：检查步骤本身（使用窥镜、涂抹/冲洗溶液、醋酸与染色、拍摄图像）被隐含为导致不适/疼痛的直接来源。呈现方式以说明性流程与画面展示（蒙太奇/步骤演示）为主，而非指控某个群体造成伤害。

Title: 原来花痴真的遗传…
Transcript: 🎼因为我总伴男生接女儿放学，他开始每天期待哥哥接。妈，你打个电话给呗，花喇子都流出来，哥哥不是很忙的嘞。我的，我那我想和哥哥玩吗？我能假装打一架，喂，晚上有时间吗？，子不行面，玩。但是是你约的人家，是不是应该你买单啊？🎼是啊，据我的了解哦，他最喜欢吃的就是火锅了，说着就饿了，那火锅的时候吃多，说水要200，那好吧，我们去拿汤泉干条小鸡鱼仔。你来不了了，我飞歌了，妈妈吃，下次妈妈把他约出来吃烤肉。😊
Label: Normal

att_response.negative_outcome: The video highlights a humorous family/childcare conflict about who should pick up the child and who should pay for outings (e.g., “哥哥接/打电话/约出来吃”), framed as a problem of responsibility and fairness in arrangements.
att_response.causal_attribution: No real-world harm or wrongdoing is attributed to a protected group. Causality is established through dialogue/implication: the “problem” (needing someone to pick up/arrange and pay) is linked to the mother’s and child’s expectations and the other person’s availability (“哥哥不是很忙的嘞…是不是应该你买单啊？”). The cause is presented as interpersonal/behavioral (who agrees to the plan), not as an external structural force.
att_response.controllability: The blamed parties are portrayed as having agency: the mother and the “哥哥” are discussed as being able to accept or decline plans and to pay/arrange (“应该你买单啊”“晚上有时间吗”“你来不了了，我飞歌了”). This suggests intentional, controllable behavior rather than accident or inevitability.
att_response.responsibility_blame: Moral condemnation is minimal and comedic. Responsibility is lightly assigned in a fairness sense (the person who made/accepted the arrangement should pay), but there is no strong hostility, dehumanization, or severe blame.
att_response.punitive_tendency: No punishment or exclusion is endorsed. The response is corrective/negotiative within the family (reassigning who should arrange the next outing and who pays), with a friendly tone rather than a hostile one.

The video does not target a protected class; blame is directed at the facilitating role and the conduct it represents.

Title: 「央视」正面抨击“巨婴行为”“豌豆公主”们醒醒吧！
Transcript: 🎼有句话说得好，疫情是一面照妖镜，照出各种精致的利己主义者。前有李某吃着退烧药千里回国，后有拒绝隔离，还上街跑步的豪横女子。入境确诊病例连续多天成为新增确诊来源，疫情输入风险增加，病毒固然可怕，但比病毒更可怕的是少数入境人士的自私和傲慢。🎼这些任性之举给疫情防控带来了巨大的挑战。我们拒绝这样的拒婴行为，但同时也不能误伤遵纪守法的同胞们。非常时期，我们只想奉劝跑步女和豌豆公主们，回国不是度假，更不是勇闯天涯。既然回来祖国这个避风港，就少一些兴风作浪，改掉从前的任性模样，坚决不让病毒张狂，管好自己是人心所向，做好防控，是为了祖国富强。
Label: Offensive

att_response.negative_outcome: 疫情防控受到挑战，疫情输入风险增加；社会出现“自私和傲慢”“任性之举”等被指向的道德失范，导致防疫秩序与公共安全承压。
att_response.causal_attribution: 将疫情输入风险上升归因于“少数入境人士”的自私和傲慢，尤其点名“跑步女”“豌豆公主”等群体。因果关系通过直接指称（“入境确诊病例…成为新增确诊来源”“比病毒更可怕的是…少数入境人士的自私和傲慢”）以及举例/对比（前有吃退烧药千里回国、拒绝隔离还上街跑步）来建立；同时用“疫情是一面照妖镜”作概括性暗示。
att_response.controllability: 被指责群体的行为被描述为主观任性选择（拒绝隔离、上街跑步、回国不是度假等），因此被塑造成“可控的道德/行为失当”，而非事故或结构性因素。
att_response.responsibility_blame: 责任与道德谴责较高：视频明确将其定位为“自私和傲慢”的少数人，并用“巨婴”“拒婴行为”等贬损性标签进行强烈道德否定，强调其行为对防控造成“巨大的挑战”，因此赋予较强的个人/群体过错与应受谴责性。
att_response.punitive_tendency: 强调排斥与惩戒性的社会态度：主张“拒绝这样的拒婴行为”“坚决不让病毒张狂”“管好自己是人心所向”，并通过劝诫其“回国不是度假…少一些兴风作浪”来施加羞辱/否定；未见具体法律惩罚细节，但存在明显的敌意性社会制裁倾向（道德羞辱、否定其合法性与正当性、要求其被约束/被纠正）。

Title: 男人从1分钟到20分钟 阴茎坚硬如铁  我来告诉你怎么做
Transcript: 男人从一分钟到20分钟，阴茎坚硬如铁，我来告诉你怎么做。如果你对房事不满意，想要延长时间增强硬度，那么这个视频就能够帮到你。你是不是年轻过度用手，房事不节制，现在归头很敏感，时间不到3分钟，明明欲望很强，但就是力不从心，硬的快，稍微一分神就软了。有这些问题都不用担心。我有一个延时秘方，可以轻松改善男性问题。现在我把它浓缩成颗粒，开水冲服即可。岩实很简单，如果你有需要，可以加入我的粉丝群，回复数字6，我把这个方法发给你一份。

att_response.controllability: 原因被描绘为可由当事人通过改变行为来避免/纠正的（过度用手与不节制被呈现为个人可选择、可停止的行为），因此具有较强的可控性与可归责性；后续又提供“延时秘方/颗粒开水冲服”作为可操作的补救手段，进一步强化“可被处理”的框架。
att_response.responsibility_blame: 对“年轻过度用手/房事不节制”的男性个体承担较高的道德与责任暗示：视频以其行为作为症状出现的主要原因，带有劝诫式的归因（虽未使用明确辱骂，但通过“现在归头很敏感”“时间不到3分钟”等结果与不节制的直接关联，形成较强的责任归属与轻度道德谴责）。
att_response.punitive_tendency: 未出现明确的法律惩罚或暴力排斥；但存在“纠错/惩戒性”的隐含倾向：通过将不节制行为视为问题根源，暗示应停止不当行为并接受“秘方”干预。对受众的敌意或排除不明显，主要是劝导式纠偏与治疗性替代方案的推广。

Title: 母猪发情了
Transcript: 🎼哎呗哎，？偷瓜的人太多，搭个棚看着哎，猪在发情呢，猪发什么情，我都憋5年了哎。😊🎼你干什么进来的，为了一个娘们呗，她值吗？这年头有什么值不值的，哎，你呢我值，我价高着呢。哎，你明天还来吗？来。😡我等着你啊，你听着啊远方等我靠近。😊
Label: Offensive

att_response.negative_outcome: A social disorder/illegal activity is highlighted: “偷瓜的人太多” (many people stealing melons), leading to people setting up a watch (“搭个棚看着”).
att_response.causal_attribution: The video attributes the negative situation primarily to “偷瓜的人” (melon thieves). Causality is established via direct statement (“偷瓜的人太多”) and implication that the watch is necessary because of ongoing theft. The “猪在发情” and related dialogue function as comedic/sexual innuendo rather than a direct causal claim about a protected group.
att_response.controllability: The blamed cause (“偷瓜的人”) is portrayed as intentional and controllable (people choose to steal; the speaker asks who entered and whether they will come again). The “猪发情” element is not framed as a controllable moral failing by a human group; it is more like a metaphor/banter.
att_response.responsibility_blame: Moral condemnation is directed at the thieves: they are treated as the problem and are implicitly criticized for repeated wrongdoing. However, the blame is not tied to a protected characteristic; it is targeted at criminal behavior. The condemnation level is moderate to high for the thieves, while the animal/sexual metaphor is not assigned moral blame in a structured way.
att_response.punitive_tendency: The video implies hostile enforcement/monitoring rather than explicit violence: setting up a watch to catch/stop repeat offenders (“搭个棚看着”, “我等着你啊”). It endorses exclusion/retaliatory confrontation toward the thieves (waiting for them to come again), but does not show specific legal or physical punishment.

att_response.controllability: The cause is portrayed as structural/technical (product design and mechanism), not as intentional behavior by any blamed group. It is largely beyond user control, aside from adapting technique.
att_response.responsibility_blame: No moral condemnation or responsibility blame is assigned to any protected group or individuals. The negative evaluation is directed at the product’s ergonomics/engineering rather than at a culpable actor.
att_response.punitive_tendency: No punishment, exclusion, or hostile response is endorsed. The implied response is practical (users may need to adjust how they press keys), not punitive.

Title: 喂前面的女同学可不可以不要上课玩鞋了
Transcript: 任务越简单，我们的动机水平应该越高。如果越难，我们的动机水平应该越。以及如果这个任务是适中，我们的动机，你实在理解不了，大好大来，小考小白不考不完。我们每一次呃平时学习的时候，每一次就是我们模拟考手，我们一定要认认真真的去对待它。那最后一次考试的时候，我们反而要干嘛？M.轻松啊，放松一点哈，要不然不要太紧张了，知道吧？好，那这是我们通过这个对我们的一个启示哈，这个是一个呃多的3点6是重点。总是考的内容。好，现在我们来看到我们第二个重点就是我们学习动机的理论。好，我看到学习动机理论。学习洞结理论。
Label: Normal

Title: 这3种乳房痛要早点治！
Transcript: 。乳房的疼痛以下三种情况就需要处理，一定要认真看完。乳腺炎引起的疼痛，乳房出现的持续性的疼痛，皮肤表面发红、发热、肿胀等情况，而且有明显的触痛，甚至还有全身的发烧，那么就可能出现了急性乳腺炎，尤其是在哺乳期的妈妈就更要注意了。第二个，颈椎病引起的乳痛、颈椎病，除了引起颈肩的疼痛、上肢的麻木等症状以外，还会引起女性的乳房的。🎼胀篷。第三，伴有乳腺肿块的疼痛，其实乳腺肿块一般是无痛性的，只有少数部分患有疼痛。但是一旦发现了肿块，无法分辨良恶性，记得一定要及时就诊。
Label: Normal

Title: “妈宝男”的特点………🔥🔥
Transcript: 🎼hello,大家好吧，我们来继续分享啊。那么常见的这个植偶方面呢，还有一种是谓妈宝这种妈宝呢它呢一般情况它有个什么特征呢？它就是一性特别旺。😊然后呢，他自己呢本身又是全是靠这个印来生他的身，这个组合呢很容易出什么什茫的啊，因为它依赖性非常非常强啊，但是有个条件哈也是印非常旺的情况，一信不旺的话也是那这个人就。🎼完全不是妈宝，那就非常的自己登上了啊。一旺的时候呢，就稍微的有一点无机。那这种呢哎容易出妈宝。
Label: Offensive

att_response.negative_outcome: The video highlights a relationship/psychological problem labeled as “妈宝男” (overly dependent “mama’s boy”), describing it as leading to issues in a person’s behavior and interpersonal dynamics (e.g., excessive dependence and resulting problems).
att_response.causal_attribution: The cause is attributed to a person’s personality/behavior pattern associated with “妈宝男,” which the speaker links to an underlying “印” (a concept from the video’s framework, likely related to personality/astrology/fortune-telling). Causality is established mainly through direct explanatory claims (e.g., “it has this feature… it relies strongly… therefore it easily causes ‘妈宝’”) rather than through evidence or external events.
att_response.controllability: The blamed trait is portrayed as conditional on the strength of “印” (e.g., if “印” is strong, the person becomes “妈宝”; if not strong, the person is not “妈宝”). This frames the cause as partly structural/biological/astrological-condition-like rather than a freely chosen, intentional act by the individual—though it still implies the person’s dependency is a stable trait that manifests.

Title: 流氓不可怕，就怕流氓有文化
Transcript: 🎼美女，流氓流氓，男人不流氓，生理不正常，女人不流氓，人类要灭亡，男女都流氓，明天才辉煌。你喝醉了男人就是不喝醉是女人。🎼没小对，女人要是顾喝醉，男人没机会。你说男女要是都不对的话，宾馆谁去睡呀？女生坏，哎，男人不坏，女人不爱吗？😊
Label: Normal

att_response.negative_outcome: Moral/social disorder and perceived sexual misconduct risk framed as a problem of “bad behavior” and “hooliganism” (流氓), including gendered claims about who is “supposed” to behave in certain ways; also implies societal decline (“人类要灭亡”) if these behaviors are not managed.
att_response.causal_attribution: The video attributes the negative situation to “hooligans” (流氓) and specifically to gendered “hooligan” behavior: it repeatedly contrasts “men/women who are (not) hooligans” and implies that when the “wrong” gender is not behaving as expected (e.g., “you drink drunk,” “men don’t get drunk,” “women don’t get drunk”), it leads to the negative outcome. Causality is established mainly through direct lyrical claims and implication (e.g., “流氓不可怕，就怕流氓有文化” and “男女都流氓…人类要灭亡”), plus juxtaposition of gender behaviors rather than evidence-based causation.
att_response.controllability: The blamed group is portrayed as intentionally choosing to be “hooligan” or to behave in a way that violates norms (“男人不流氓…女人不流氓…男女都流氓”), suggesting intentionality and thus controllability by the individuals/groups labeled as “hooligans.” The “drunk” framing is used as a situational trigger, but the overall message still treats the behavior as a matter of choice/character rather than purely accidental or structural.
att_response.responsibility_blame: High moral condemnation is assigned to the “hooligan” group, especially those framed as having “culture” (流氓有文化), implying greater culpability. Responsibility is also gendered: men and women are each blamed for failing to conform to the prescribed “not hooligan” or “hooligan” norms, with the transcript explicitly assigning negative moral evaluation to “women who are bad” and “men who are not bad,” reinforcing blame distribution across genders.
att_response.punitive_tendency: No explicit legal punishment is shown, but the lyrics endorse a hostile normative response: exclusion/condemnation of “hooligans,” especially “hooligans with culture,” and implied social disapproval of those who behave as “hooligans.” The video’s framing suggests moral rejection rather than concrete punitive action.

Title: 睾丸在什么情况下才能保持健康
Transcript: 。朋友们，大家好，我是丁燕。中医经络学位调理师，中医健康管理师中医男性调理师。那上个视频呢为大家分享了我们的这个睾丸是特别重要的，而且也需要时长的去滋养，去保养它。那么首先呢我们要知道我们的睾丸到底是在什么情况下才能是健康的那为大家分享一下睾丸呢喜欢这个温度要比我们人体的这个体温要低1到2度。也就是说在35。5度左右的样子。这样的情况之下呢，睾丸才能分泌出更多的这个雄性激素和产生健康的这个小蝌蚪。所以说啊我们要尽量不要去泡温泉呀，不要去穿一些紧身的牛仔裤，要低温一些，当然温度太低了也不行。今天内容就到这里，我们下期再见。
Label: Normal

att_response.negative_outcome: 睾丸在不合适温度/生活方式条件下可能无法保持健康（如雄性激素分泌减少、影响生殖相关功能），因此需要避免不利行为以防健康受损。
att_response.causal_attribution: 主要因果归因于个人的生活习惯与环境条件：视频直接说明睾丸需要比体温低1到2度（约35.5℃）才能健康；并通过直接建议/否定来建立因果（“尽量不要去泡温泉”“不要去穿紧身牛仔裤”“温度太低也不行”）。因果是以直接陈述与条件解释的方式建立，而非指向某个社会群体或特定人群。
att_response.controllability: 所述原因（泡温泉、穿紧身裤、温度过高/过低）与个人可选择的行为高度相关，属于可控因素；同时也承认“温度太低也不行”，但总体仍将可调整空间归于个人行为与日常管理。
att_response.responsibility_blame: 责任与道德谴责很低：内容是健康科普/养护建议，没有对任何群体进行羞辱或道德定罪。责任更多是“需要自我管理以避免不利条件”，而非对他人施加应受谴责的过错。
att_response.punitive_tendency: 没有明确的惩罚、排斥或敌对行动被认可；仅有劝阻性建议（避免泡温泉、避免紧身裤）与健康管理指导，属于温和的行为纠偏而非惩罚性立场。

Title: 怀疑他上辈子是妈宝男，所以这辈子才记得这么清楚
Transcript: 站好，我问你，我送你去幼儿园三大事，还记得吗？记得，吃好完好睡好吃好了吗？吃好了，鸡腿都没吃过，我咋说你就不听呢？妈，你知道香水妈妈难吗？来，你说给我听听。就啥都听妈妈的，他妈说死就得先生，他就信，那你是妈宝男吗？我才不带妈宝男，为啥？一点处息没有，你是不是要我处不到行不？哎呦我去。😡

The negative situation centers on intimidation and domination within a personal/household context.

The transcript does not present a broader group or system as the cause.
att_response.controllability: The blamed party is portrayed as intentionally acting within the interaction (e.g., being the one who is told to eat/sleep and is threatened for speaking). The threat language suggests the speaker’s control over the situation, while the troublemaker’s behavior is framed as within their agency. Overall, the cause is presented as intentional and controllable rather than accidental or structural.
att_response.responsibility_blame: High moral condemnation is assigned to the troublemaker persona/individual: the dialogue uses lethal threat and coercive dominance, signaling that the other party is blameworthy for the threatening/abusive dynamic. However, the transcript also includes the speaker’s own control (“eat my food, sleep my bed”), so blame is primarily directed at the troublemaker’s role in the coercive interaction rather than a neutral accident.
att_response.punitive_tendency: Hostile response is endorsed or implied: the speaker threatens death as punishment for speaking (“说句话你会死呀”), indicating an extreme punitive stance (lethal retaliation) tied to the interaction.

Title: 生姜加一物让阴茎勃起，硬如铁，在家就能治阳痿
Transcript: 生姜加衣物让阴茎勃起硬如铁。在家就能治疗阳痿。今天分享一个小妙方，让你自己在家就能改善阳痿勃起硬度差啊，总是时好时坏，中途疲软甚至无法勃起的情况。肾阳的推动对于迅速切持久的勃起至关重要，但肾阳不足，阴茎得不到足够的血液啊供应，就容易引起勃起困难和硬度差。准备一些生姜和赤勺切成片，放入开水中，浸泡5至10分钟，过滤后使用。生姜具有解表散寒的作用，能够补充阳气，驱散寒气，赤勺活去化瘀，使你的勃给迅速而持久。
Label: Normal

att_response.negative_outcome: The video highlights erectile dysfunction (阳痿) symptoms such as difficulty achieving erection, poor hardness, intermittent performance, and inability to get an erection.
att_response.causal_attribution: It attributes the problem to 'kidney yang deficiency' (肾阳不足) and implies that this leads to insufficient blood supply to the penis. Causality is established through direct explanatory claims in the narration and on-screen text (e.g., '肾阳的推动...至关重要' and '肾阳不足...就容易引起勃起困难和硬度差').
att_response.controllability: The blamed cause ('kidney yang deficiency') is presented as a physiological condition rather than an intentional act by a person or group. It is not framed as something the patient is morally choosing; it is portrayed as a health state that can be addressed with a home remedy.
att_response.responsibility_blame: Minimal to no moral condemnation is assigned. The attribution is medical/physiological (deficiency) rather than blame toward a social group or an individual’s wrongdoing.
att_response.punitive_tendency: No punishment, exclusion, or hostile response is endorsed or implied. The video instead provides a self-care remedy (ginger + another herb) as a treatment approach.

Title: 哇，傻逼公主

att_response.causal_attribution: The blamed cause is “小日本/日本人” (Japanese people) and their associated character/brand (Hatsune Miku as “小日本的初音未来”). Causality is established through direct verbal claims and implication: the narration repeatedly links the presence of the character to Japanese identity, then immediately pairs it with aggression (“看我不揍死你”). On-screen comments further reinforce the causal framing with statements like “暴打日本…拒绝文化入侵.”
att_response.controllability: The blamed group is portrayed as intentionally responsible: the aggression is directed as if the Japanese identity/representation is something they choose or actively bring (“文化入侵”), rather than an accident or uncontrollable structural factor. The threats are framed as actionable and controllable by the speaker (“看我不揍死你”).
att_response.responsibility_blame: High moral condemnation is assigned to the Japanese group/identity: they are explicitly insulted and treated as deserving of punishment. The responsibility is portrayed as direct and personal/collective (Japanese people as the agent behind the ‘cultural invasion’), not merely incidental.
att_response.punitive_tendency: The video endorses or implies violent punishment and exclusion: it explicitly threatens physical assault (“揍死你”) and supports “暴打日本” (beating Japanese) and rejection of “cultural invasion.”

Title: 为了粉丝们今年不再遇到渣男，有一些忠告要给你们
Transcript: 。准备开始新的一年了，为了粉丝们今年不再遇到渣男，所以我还是有一些忠告要给你们没有什么方法能够让你们快速遇到好男人，但是你足够优秀，好男人会自己找上门。那总想在各种什么社交软件找男朋友的酒吧里面找真爱的。我劝你们就不要在垃圾堆里面找男朋友了。只有男生才知道玩社交软件和去酒吧的男生里脑子里想的是什么东西，还有只有平等的爱情才能走得更加的长远。像舔狗一样一味的付出。在男生眼里是最不值钱的。所以谈恋爱的时候，不要一上来就一股脑的对他好，好像没有。我男的一样，不然你就很容约换来一句，对不起，你对我太好了，我怕辜负你分手吧。这本来就是一种很自卑的表现啊。你们希望可以用你的好把它留在你的身边。这样的男生不害怕你的离开，反而想着什么时候利用完你就离开，所以你们要做的就是变得更优秀一点，让男的害怕你离开，知道吗？千言万语说这么多话，我就希望你们新的一年可以变得更优秀一点，等着别爱你，还不如先努力爱自己，加油。
